description: Style Note adidas helps you avoid discomforts and keep dry and comfortable. These T-shirts also offer you a stylised look that is most flattering on your day off. Pair it with a pair of jeans and sports shoes on the weekend or for Friday casuals to your office. Product Details Blue T-shirt, has a V neckline, short sleeves, graphic print in front and branding in the graphic print Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
